name: dynamic-tiler
description: Dynamic window tiling utility for Linux (X11)

scripts.build:extension: esbuild src/extension.ts --bundle --outfile=/home/bn/.local/share/cinnamon/extensions/dynamic-tiler@cinnamon.org/extension.js --platform=neutral --target=es2020 --global-name=DynamicTiler --format=iife && echo 'var init = DynamicTiler.init;' >> /home/bn/.local/share/cinnamon/extensions/dynamic-tiler@cinnamon.org/extension.js && echo 'var enable = DynamicTiler.enable;' >> /home/bn/.local/share/cinnamon/extensions/dynamic-tiler@cinnamon.org/extension.js && echo 'var disable = DynamicTiler.disable;' >> /home/bn/.local/share/cinnamon/extensions/dynamic-tiler@cinnamon.org/extension.js && cp settings-schema.json /home/bn/.local/share/cinnamon/extensions/dynamic-tiler@cinnamon.org/settings-schema.json
scripts.build: npm run build:cli && npm run build:extension
